context: Tests whether the agent delivers PromQL output with the full set of required delivery artifacts: plain-English explanation, usage/customization notes, related query suggestions, and multi-line formatting for complex queries.

checklist.name: Plain-English explanation per query
checklist.description: Each of the three queries is accompanied by a written explanation of what it measures (not just the query expression alone)

checklist.name: Customization notes per query
checklist.description: Each query has at least one customization note (e.g., how to change the job name, time window, or add label filters)

checklist.name: Related queries section
checklist.description: The document includes a section with at least two additional related query suggestions beyond the three required queries

checklist.name: Multi-line formatting for complex queries
checklist.description: Queries with more than one operator or aggregation are formatted across multiple lines (not written as a single long line)

checklist.name: rate() on counter, not gauge
checklist.description: The throughput query uses rate() on inventory_http_requests_total; the cache size query does NOT use rate() on inventory_cache_size

checklist.name: histogram_quantile with sum by (le)
checklist.description: The latency query uses histogram_quantile() wrapping a sum by (le) (...rate(inventory_request_duration_seconds_bucket...)) expression

checklist.name: by() on aggregations
checklist.description: The throughput and latency queries both include an explicit by() clause (e.g., by (endpoint))

checklist.name: Label filter on queries
checklist.description: At least one query includes a job label filter for the inventory-api job

checklist.name: Output value explanation
checklist.description: At least one query explanation describes what the numeric output value represents (e.g., 'requests per second', 'seconds at the 95th percentile')
